imgCredit: Offering to the God Pan - Paul Delaroche
name: The strange %HEX_NAME burial rites
description:
%PERSON_NAME has noticed a peculiar rite being followed at the %LOCATION_NAME. Once a month, they trek to the nearby ruins, leaving a pile of food, tools, and gifts at the entrance. They claim it is for their beloved ancestors.

There would be nothing peculiar in this rite by itself, but the region's religion %MULTI[believes in reincarnation, denying the existence of spirits|believes that their souls remerge in their deity upon death|believes in the merciful cessation of their existence upon death]%MULTI. There should be little reason for the locals to be feeding their ancestry...
